name: claude-code-skill-factory
description: A comprehensive toolkit for generating production-ready Claude Skills, Code Agents, slash commands, and LLM prompts at scale. Includes interactive builder agents, 69 prompt presets, slash commands for the full skill lifecycle, and multiple example generated skills with Python implementation files.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
